title: athyrium sinense subsp. longipes
intro: Athyrium sinense subsp. longipes, also known as Chinese lady fern, is a subspecies of fern native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, with benefits including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-oxidative properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
